ALREADY_SUBMITTED: You already have a KYC submission under review.
REQUIRES_RESUBMISSION: Your KYC requires resubmission. Please use the /kyc/resubmit endpoint.
NO_SUBMISSION_FOUND: No existing KYC submission found. Please submit a new one.
RESUBMISSION_NOT_ALLOWED: Resubmission is only allowed when your KYC status is RESUBMISSION_REQUIRED.
ONLY_PENDING_CAN_APPROVE: Only pending submissions can be approved
